name: Maple Syrup Shortbreads
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Generously butter a 9-inch square baking dish.
3. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy in a processor.
4. Add the flour and process just until blended; do not form a ball.
5. Pat the dough into the bottom of the prepared dish.
6. Bake the shortbread until it is light brown, about 25 minutes.
7. For the topping, beat together packed brown sugar, pure maple syrup, and room temperature unsalted butter in a bowl.
8. Beat in vanilla extract.
9. Pour the mixture over the shortbread.
10. Sprinkle chopped toasted walnuts evenly on top.
11. Bake the entire dessert until the topping is set, about 25 minutes.
12. Cool on a rack.
13. Cut into 1-1/2 inch squares.
14. Store in an airtight container.
Source: Bon Appetit magazine, December 1984. Typed for you by Karen Mintzias
